# Get an Ad

**Web Service Endpoint**

Fetches an ad assigned to an ad group by identifier.

## Discussion

Use this endpoint to fetch an [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Ad] assigned to an ad group. Use your `adId` in the resource path.

### Payload example: Get an ad



## Ad Endpoints

- **Create an Ad**: Creates an ad in an ad group with a creative.
- **Find Ads**: Finds ads within a campaign by selector criteria.
- **Find Ads (org-level)**: Fetches ads within an organization by selector criteria.
- **Get All Ads**: Fetches all ads assigned to an ad group.
- **Update an Ad**: Updates an ad in an ad group.
- **Delete an Ad**: Deletes an ad from an ad group.
